Knowledge is your greatest defense.
You deserve to know your options.

Most homeowners facing foreclosure don't lose their homes because they ran out of time. They lose them because nobody told them what was possible.

Featured Guide
Education Series · Utah Foreclosure

Utah Foreclosure Timeline: How Long Does Foreclosure Take in Utah?

Think foreclosure happens fast? Utah's process takes a minimum of 240 days — but your options expire long before the auction. CDPS-certified broker Tiffany Lancaster breaks down every stage.

By Tiffany Lancaster · April 30, 2026 Read the Guide →
